title: PCR Experiment Setup with GoTaq® G2 Master Mixes
author: Promega Corporation
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.k5icy4e

steps.instruction: Thaw the GoTaq® G2 Green Master Mix at room temperature. GoTaq® G2 Green Master Mix Promega Catalog #M7822 Undetermined, Thawing Minimize the number of freezethaw cycles by storing in working aliquots. Product may be stored at 4°C for up to 18 weeks. Mix well prior to use.
Vortex the Master Mix, then spin it briefly in a microcentrifuge to collect the material at the bottom of the tube.
Prepare one of the following reaction mixes on ice: a
If using a thermal cycler without a heated lid, overlay the reaction mix with 1–2 drops (approximately 50μl) of mineral oil to prevent evaporation during thermal cycling. undetermined, Mineral oil
Centrifuge the reactions in a microcentrifuge for 5 seconds. 00:00:05, Centrifugation
Place the reactions in a thermal cycler that has been preheated to 95°C. Undetermined, Preheated thermal cycler
Perform PCR using your standard parameters.
